original_image_tags: A scanned, slightly yellowed and creased document form. It is an AF FORM 112-PART I, dated 1 June 1948. There are handwritten notes in pencil or pen at the top left and top right margins. The form is filled out with typed text, with some fields left blank.

elements.description: A scanned United States Air Force form (AF FORM 112 - PART 1, approved 1 June 1948) containing typed fields and a summary. No photographs, sketches, or diagrams are present. Handwritten annotations include 'Map', 'Bama! Flying', and a circled 'Folder' in the top margin.

judge.reason: Both sides agree there are no photographs, sketches, or diagrams, and both note the presence of handwritten annotations in the top margins, but they disagree on the specific text of those annotations (A mentions no content, B lists 'Map', 'Bama! Flying', and 'Folder').
